title: Incident Review Board - Task Template
description: Schema establishing form fields, read-only AI analytics, and decision outcomes for human compliance reviews in UiPath Action Center.

readOnlyContext.description: Original incident context and AI recommendations shown to the reviewer.

decision.description: The final Action Center disposition chosen by the human auditor.

reviewerNotes.description: Mandatory audit explanation justifying the human disposition or AI recommendation override.

reviewerName.description: E-signature of the authorized compliance auditor.

cmiiChangeReqId.description: CMII Change Request ID generated if the decision requires formal board review.
